title: ptilotus exaltatus var. exaltatus
intro: Ptilotus exaltatus var. exaltatus, commonly known as Common Snotty Gum or Purple Copperwort, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Ptilotus exaltatus var. exaltatus include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Ptilotus exaltatus var. exaltatus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
